$comment: Define WHO to generate. Each entry = one character. Edit this list, then generate. The 'description' is the ONLY creative input you write per character — the style contract handles the rest, so every entry comes out cohesive. 'rawPrefix' points the importer at already-downloaded rotations (from an MCP generation) named <rawPrefix>_<direction>.png.

characters.name: Grizzled Merc
characters.description: grizzled tactical mercenary in dark tactical body armor holding a rifle

characters.name: Red Sentinel
characters.description: heroic superhero in a red and gold armored suit with a short cape, confident stance

characters.name: Surge
